info.title: Flipdish API - Stores
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Stores operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

AddressFormResponse.description: A response of a dyanmic form definition.

StartTime.description: Date and time in ISO 8601 format.

EndTime.description: Date and time in ISO 8601 format.

StartTime.description: Date and time in ISO 8601 format.

EndTime.description: Date and time in ISO 8601 format.

CreateLocation.description: Input model for creating a Location

DisplayOrder.description: The order that the Location should be displayed on the screen

ExternalLocationId.description: Id of the Location on an external system

CreateLocationArea.description: Input model for creating a LocationArea

CustomerMessages.description: Delivery and pickup menu messages for a customer

DeliveryFee.description: Delivery fee (will not be set below 0)

MinimumDeliveryOrderAmount.description: Minimum delivery order amount (will not be set below 0)

WellKnownText.description:
Spatial data in Well Known Text format
We also support CIRCLE((0 0, 200)) - (centerLong centerLat, radius in m)

FlipdishError.description: Standard Flipdish API error response. Errors are returned as a JSON object with a human-readable message and a programmatic error code (see https://developers.flipdish.com/docs/error-handling).

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for programmatic error handling.

details.description: Additional context returned in non-production environments.

GroupedCoordinates.description: Describes coordinates that have a group

Count.description: Count of members in the group

DispatchType.description: There are two valid values for this field - `collection` and `delivery`.

LeadTimeMinutes.description: This must be a positive integer.

StoreId.description: Id of the Store that this LocationArea belongs to

LocationAreaWithLocations.description: Represents a LocationArea and its Location list

StoreId.description: Id of the Store that this LocationArea belongs to

Locations.description: List of Locations that belongs to this Location Area

IsDeleted.description: Returns if the LocationArea is deleted or not

LocationArea_Location.description: Representation of a Location i.e: (Table, Hotel Room, Car Park, etc )

DisplayOrder.description: The order that the Location should be displayed on the screen

ExternalLocationId.description: Id of the Location on an external system

IsDeleted.description: Shows if the Location is deleted or not

MappedLocation.description: Representation of a Location and its External Mapping

ExternalLocationId.description: Id of the Location on an external system

OrderLeadTimes.description:
When orders are accepted, and no lead time is specified by the operator, this is the lead time that will be
applied to the order.

LeadTimeMinutes.description:
Mapping from the type of order to, to the default lead time that will be applied to those orders.
The lead time is an integer number of minutes.

AlwaysAppearOpen.description: Specifies whether a customer can pre-order outside the store opening hours or not.

RequireExplicitSelectAlways.description: Force customer to select collection time.

PercentFee.description: Percent fee to customer, including VAT

FixedFee.description: Fixed fee to customer, including VAT

Range.description:
A class that represents a single opening period in a day.
This starts 'StartTime' after midnight and runs for a 'Period'
after that, on the given DayOfWeek.

Enabled.description: Enable Service Charge for store true(on) / false(off)

IsOptional.description: Sets the service charge to be optional

DisplayWithProcessingFee.description: Display service charge together with processing fee

IncludesVouchers.description:
If true, will include voucher value in calculation 
i.e 10E order with 1E service charge and 5E voucher would have service charge at 0.5E

StoreGroupId.description: Store group id to which this store belongs

OrderConfirmationMessageOverrideDelivery.description: Overridden confirmation message for delivery orders

OrderConfirmationMessageOverridePickup.description: Overridden confirmation message for pickup orders

MicrosoftTimeZone.description:
Microsoft Time Zone Index Values (https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/library/ms912391)
(Editable through store coordinate change)

IanaTimeZone.description:
IANA Time Zone (https://www.iana.org/time-zones)
(Editable through store coordinate change)

AlwaysAppearOpen.description: True if the store always appears open

PreOrderEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pre-orders

TakeOutEnabled.description: True if the store accepts take-out orders

TableServiceEnabled.description: True if the store has table service

DineInEnabled.description: True if the store accepts dine-in orders

AllowPreOrdersAndTableService.description: True if both pre-orders and talbe service can be enabled

PickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pickup orders

DeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts delivery orders

CardOrderDeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts card payment for delivery orders

CashOrdersDeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts cash payment for delivery orders

CardOrdersPickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts card payment for pickup orders

CashOrdersPickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts cash payment for pickup orders

TipsEnabled.description: True if the store accepts tips

AutomaticallyAcceptOrders.description: True if the stores orders are automatically accepted in Flipdish

OpenForDelivery.description: True if the store is open for delivery

OpenForPickup.description: True if the store is open for pickup

RequireCustomerNameForPickup.description: True if customer name required for pickup orders

GdprCustomerPhoneNumbers.description: Mask your customers phone numbers printed on receipts and reduce the amout of personally identifiable customer information that is exposed.

RequireCustomerNameForDelivery.description: True if customer name required for delivery orders

AllowChefNotes.description: True if the customer is allowed enter custom notes with their orders

EtaInPickupConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will be ready for collection

EtaInDeliveryConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will delivered

StaffLanguage.description:
Staff Language (used for communication with the staff)
Emails, Printouts etc

AddressFields.description: Dyanmic field/value pairs, defined by the form assigned to the given country code.

SingleLineDisplay.description: Single line display i18n, may be empty for not supported countries

TwoLinesDisplay.description: Two line display i18n, may be empty for not supported countries

AddressFields.description: Dyanmic field/value pairs, defined by the form assigned to the given country code.

SingleLineDisplay.description: Single line display i18n, may be empty for not supported countries

TwoLinesDisplay.description: Two line display i18n, may be empty for not supported countries

AlwaysAppearOpen.description: True if the store always appears open

PreOrderEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pre-orders

TakeOutEnabled.description: True if the store accepts take-out orders

TableServiceEnabled.description: True if the store has table service

DineInEnabled.description: True if the store accepts dine-in orders

AllowPreOrdersAndTableService.description: True if both pre-orders and talbe service can be enabled

PickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pickup orders

DeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts delivery orders

CardOrderDeliveryEnabled.description: True if the store accepts card payment for delivery orders

CashOrdersPickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts cash payment for pickup orders

AutomaticallyAcceptOrders.description: True if the stores orders are automatically accepted in Flipdish

OpenForPickup.description: True if the store is open for pickup

RequireCustomerNameForPickup.description: True if customer name required for pickup orders

GdprCustomerPhoneNumbers.description: Mask your customers phone numbers printed on receipts and reduce the amout of personally identifiable customer information that is exposed.

RequireCustomerNameForDelivery.description: True if customer name required for delivery orders

AllowChefNotes.description: True if the customer is allowed enter custom notes with their orders

EtaInPickupConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will be ready for collection

EtaInDeliveryConfirmationSmsEnabled.description: True if order confirmation sms includes estimated time when order will delivered

StaffLanguage.description:
Staff Language (used for communication with the staff)
Emails, Printouts etc

PickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pickup orders

PickupEnabled.description: True if the store accepts pickup orders

BankAccountAttached.description: True if the store has a Bank Account attached

PickupHours.description: True if the store has Pickup hours

FixedFeeCardPosTransaction.description: Gets or sets the fixed fee for POS transactions.

FixedFeeOrderWithGoogle.description: Additional fixed fee charged on orders submitted through Order With Google

Reason.description: Reason for the last fee change (optional)

Currency used by the stores in this group

StoreHeaders.description: Store Headers associated with Store Group

BrandIds.description: List of brand ids (AppIds) that are associated with this store group

Currency.description: Currency used by the stores in this group

StoreHeader.description: Represents the most basic store information, used mostly for searches

StoreOrderCapacityConfig.description: Represents one store's order capacity configuration

DeliveryType.description: Signifies whether the order capacity configuration is for Delivery / Pickup

StoreIntervalInMinutes.description: Store Interval - time between orders, e.g. 10 minutes between each order time available to customer

StoreOrderCapacityConfigEditModel.description: Represents one store's order capacity configuration edit

StoreOrderCapacityPeriod.description: Represents a single order capacity period

MaxOrderNumberPerStoreInterval.description:
The maximum number of orders per each store order interval in this order capacity period.
E.g. for a period from 9:00 till 11:00, if the store's interval is 10 minutes, and MaxOrderNumberPerStoreInterval is set to 5,
it means that within each 10-minute interval between 9:00 and 11:00 (i.e. 9:00-9:10, 9:10-9:20, .. , 10:50-11:00) it will be possible to
request at most 5 orders.

DayOfTheWeek.description: Day of the week the period pertains to

PeriodStartHour.description: The hour the period starts at

PeriodStartMinutes.description: The minutes after the hour the period starts at

PeriodEndHour.description: The hour the period ends at

PeriodEndMinutes.description: The minutes after the hour the period ends at

UpdateLocationArea.description: Input model for updating a LocationArea

IsDeleted.description: Sets if the Location Area should be soft deleted or not

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Implicit grant for first-party portal apps; client credentials grant for server-to-server App Store apps (exchange Client ID + Secret Key for a bearer access token).
